title: NoMo' Portals
body:
![Image](https://imgur.com/fn5XNw0.png)

                                              A simple mod which **disables** Vanilla and Modded **portals**.

![Feature](https://imgur.com/gIvReLl.png)

**Portal Disabler**

- Disables teleportation in vanilla and modded dimensions. Via the configuration file, you can set which portal is disabled and which one is not.

**Extra Features**

- Disables right click interaction (search action) for **Ender Eye**.
- Removes the teleportation functionality for **Ender Pearl**.
- **Message Warning** for disabled portals.

**Available Mod Compatibility**

**The Twilight Forest** (1.18.2 - 1.20.1), **Tropicraft** (1.18.2 - 1.20.1 exept 1.19.4), **The Bumblezone** (1.18.2 - 1.19.4), **The Undergarden** (1.18.2 - 1.20.1). More in development!
